mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT er.员工编码) FROM EMPLOYEE_ROLE er JOIN ROLE_PERMISSION rp ON er.角色编号 = rp.角色编号 WHERE rp.权限编号 = #{permissionId}
SELECT DISTINCT p.权限编码 FROM EMPLOYEE_ROLE er JOIN ROLE_PERMISSION rp ON er.角色编号 = rp.角色编号 JOIN PERMISSION p ON rp.权限编号 = p.权限编号 WHERE er.员工编码 = #{employeeId} AND p.权限编码 IS NOT NULL AND p.权限编码 != ''
